additional.simplyswords_epicfied.arcanet: Standard combo: press A 6 times. Dash attack: A while running. Jump attack: Space+A. Aerial slice: dash attack-B-A-A-A-A-A.

Innate skill combo: send target to air by dash attack, then hold B and attack in air(require first successful hit). Combining with Ender obscuris skill opens window for better combo. Extended Arcanic slice: dash attack-B-A-A(+Ender obscuris)-A(+Ender obscuris)-A(+Ender obscuris)-B. Arcanic sliced dive: dash A-B-A-A-A-A(hold B after any of A).
Innate skill: hold B to dive into air and then hold B once more. Triggers powerful slam from sky, damage scales with innate skill stacks and sweeping edge enchant.
additional.simplyswords_epicfied.brimsto: Standard combo: press A 8 times. Fast combo: A-A-B. Advanced combo: A-A-A-B-A-A-A-B-B. Brimstone heat-up combo: A-A-A-B-A-B. Dash attack: A while running. Jump attack: Space+A.

When appear special icon on right side hold B to inflict target on fire. this effect can be stacked to 2. Hold B right after basic 4 to extinguish fire from targer, dealing additional damage and increase heat level for innate skill

To activate hold C first and then B, this attack inflict only long stun. When appear special icon on right side hold B to activate one of special skills: Brimstone conversion(require atleast 15-20% heat), Brimstone prison(require atleast 40-50% heat), Domain of Flames(require 90-100% heat)

After Brimstone overheat(C+B) hold B. Trigger fire explosion and transform Brimstone Claymore into 'forbidden flame' form, gain completely different combat style.  This mode locks heat level and comsume it over time. To exit this form use C+B, it will trigger Brimstone prison and transform weapon back into normal form. Standard combo: press A 10 times. Advanced combo: A-A-A-A-B(repeat as much as possible)-A-A-A-A-B(repeat as much as possible)-A-A. Jump attack trigger guard break on enemy.

After Brimstone overheat(C+B) when heat level is more than 40% hold B. catch enemy with strong hit and release soul fire, this attack inflict 'Brimstone flame' what have longer duration and can be consumed by basic 4 B multiple times.

After Brimstone overheat(C+B) when heat level is more than 90% hold B. Burn all targets in 5x5 area and inflict 'Brimstone flame' on them. Every 2 seconds all targets within 'Domain of flames' take fire damage. Heat level gain in this state is doubled until it reach 0%.
additional.simplyswords_epicfied.dormant: Standard combo: press A 5 times. Dash attack: A while running. Jump attack: Space+A.
additional.simplyswords_epicfied.hearthf: Standard combo: press A 7 times. Volcanic rage combo: press A 9 times. Volcanic explosion: after 9th attack of volcanic rage combo press A, can be triggered multiple times. Dash attack: A while running. Jump attack: Space+A.

Innate skill: To activate hold B, highly not recommended to activate using hypervitality. Enters into 'Volcanic rage' mode. Gives stun immunity and more powerful combo, but damages wielder over time. To cancel this mode hold B again. Volcanic invasion: Space+A-A multiple times.

To activate hold C. Enters into 'Volcano channel' state. In this state wielder can barely move, lose health in exchange of resistance and charging more powerful final attack. There are 4 types of charging, each one have unique sound, icon and animation on which state one you are. Charged 1: Hold C for until unique sound, release strong spin attack what hit target 3 times. Charged 2: Hold C for until unique sound second time, release strong upperslash. Charged 3: Hold C for until unique sound third time, release powerful hit on the ground. Charged 4: Hold C for until unique sound fourth time, gain 3x damage buff on next hit, can be stacked with charged attack. Volcano destruction: Hold C 4 times to get buff, and then 3 more times to activate charged 3, released strongest attack. Volcano desctruction deal over 105 magic + over 115 melee damage at it's base.
additional.simplyswords_epicfied.shadows: Standard combo: press A 8 times. Dash attack: A while running. Jump attack: Space+A. Shadowcatch: A-A-A-A-A-A-A-A-Space+A
While attacking at right time, automatically parries any incoming damage. You can parry negative potion effect like poison or wither
Greatly enhances stamina regeneration. Now it regenerate even while attacking.

Innate skill: To activate hold B. First hit apply long stun, then next deal 1.5x damage from basic one, this skill can be stacked up to 2. Continue hold B if you hit more than 1 targer to deal additional slash.
While have 2 stacks of innate skill Hold B-0.25sec delay-Hold B-release, last slash deal 1.75x damage of basic one, can be canceled by using standard combo.
additional.simplyswords_epicfied.slumber: Standard combo: press A 5 times. Dash attack: A while running. Jump attack: Space+A.
additional.simplyswords_epicfied.soulren: Standard combo: press A 6 times. Dash attack: A while running. Jump attack: Space+A. Awakened Demon mode: press A 11 times. Wither corruption: in Awakened Demon mode press Space+A(inflict wither V if target have no effects, or additional I-III stacks), require 2.5 hearts.
Apply sweeping edge III on Soulrender to greatly enhance wither effect chance and stacks from attacks. Enhances Awakened Demon mode.

Hold C to aim, release to shoot, 5 sec cooldown, require innate skill points. Shoot a withered soul on target, if projectile hit entity remembers it's last position. After that press C to teleport target to that position and apply stun on it.

Innate skill: To activate hold B. Enter to Awakened Demon mode, set timer to 20(or 50 with sweeping edge III). Completely changes moveset, first 2 attacks of basic combo have chance to apply wither on target(this effect can be stacked), third attack consume all wither stacks from target dealing additional damage and heal wielder, increase timer depend on how many stacks were consumed(+2 sec for each). Rest of attacks have chance to increase Awakened Demon mode timer by 2 sec per hit.

While in Awakened Demon mode, to activate press C. Require more than 80 seconds of Awakened Demon mode timer, consume 80 seconds of it. Summons black hole, while it active: stacks wither effect very fast, attach all nearby entities to black hole. After few seconds it explodes dealing huge damage based on stacked wither effect.
additional.simplyswords_epicfied.stars_e: Bright galaxy mode: press A 6 times. Galaxy eclipse mode: press A 6 times. Stars cycle: A while running. Jump attack: Space+A. Stars cutter: while in Galaxy eclipse mode Space+A(repeat A as long as stamina allows it).
By using Stars cycle attack you can switch between Bright galaxy and Galaxy eclipse modes.

Innate skill: To activate hold B. This attack apply special glow effect on all nearby entities and throw them 7 block up. Hitting mob with glowing apply blindness effect on them and gives invisibility on wielder for 6 seconds, any attack on entity with blindness effect in Galaxy eclipse mode resets the timer. This skill can be stacked to 2

In this mode: lose ability to guard, but gain stronger attacks and combo instead. Delayed stars cutter: Space+A(repeat A with 0.75-1 sec delay). Galactic cutter: Stars cycle(if in Bright galaxy mode)-B-Delayed stars cutter. Eclipse cutter: A-A-A-A-A-Delayed stars cutter.
description.simplyswords_epicfied.arcane: Don't worry, you already in the air and I'll finish you off quickly.
description.simplyswords_epicfied.brimst: Let them Burn again and again...
Prepare to be burned into ashes...
description.simplyswords_epicfied.combo_: Key explanation: A=basic attack(LMB), B=innate skill(hold LMB/binded key), C=block(click/hold RMB)
description.simplyswords_epicfied.dorman: When I use this sword with shield I begin to hear weird voices... They whisper: 'take thy sword, find Gesetz... remove the seal and thus... combine'.
description.simplyswords_epicfied.hearth: Total volcanic destruction! But at what cost...
Eruption is not that special, if you already burned into ashes...
description.simplyswords_epicfied.shadow: Haha, nice try... now it's time to pay for your mistake!
You feel strong presence of something while holding this weapon... It makes you even more energetic and unstoppable!
They won't even notice what happened.
description.simplyswords_epicfied.soulre: Such a poor souls, going to be used at toor for total desctruction...
Time's UP! You can run, you can hide, but it's too late for you, my dear.
description.simplyswords_epicfied.stars_: They appear at bright day and hide in dark night.
Each star will blow up one day... so as you
item.simplyswords_epicfied.arcanethyst.d: Someone says this halberd fell directly from the space like a small meteor. But in reality this weapon is not 'cosmic one', yet people still believe in this theory... Maybe it's because how effective wielder can send enemies on the sky and them in air? Who knows... One thing is certain - do not mess with levitating power of this halberd!
item.simplyswords_epicfied.brimstone_cla: Legend says... This is one of few weapons what was created from purest flame and then forged in soul sand valley using ancient ritual.
item.simplyswords_epicfied.dormant_relic: Such a strange sword... I'm sure it have huge power inside, but for some reason I can't unleash it yet. Looks like anciet energy of this weapon got sealed, need find a way how to remove that rutial!
item.simplyswords_epicfied.hearthflame.d: This hammer was forged from cursed volcano ore and contain flame energy from depth of nether. Wielder can feel not only strong heat while holding it, but also strange presence what wants take control over and destroy everything on it's way.
item.simplyswords_epicfied.shadowsting.d: Don't underestimate this rapier! It not only have pure dark energy what enhances wielder abilities, but also can destroy most armored targets with shadow curse. Those who wield this weapon becomes almost immortal, have unbelievably strong agility and dark tricks.
item.simplyswords_epicfied.slumbering_li: Legend says this weapon was one of most deadliest long time ago, but now it lost all it's power... Yet it still contain so many souls of dead or tortured ones inside! Maybe there is a way to empower and wake up the true form of lichblade?
item.simplyswords_epicfied.soulrender.de: Strangely agressive force sealed inside of this scythe... and so many souls... is this weapon alive?! Many people says it's cursed by unknown to this world power, someone even said that one of previous wielders got insane and his soul was merged with this weapon and anyone who dare to hold it might lose control over own body and mind... Such a high price for a huge power!
item.simplyswords_epicfied.stars_edge.de: There is still no 100% accurate information how or when this weapon appeared... Someone says it was runic twiblade what got fused with unknown galactic energy and transformed into this while others telling that it came from End Farlands. There are many legends of origin of Star's Edge, but all of them have same answer: it's not from our universe.
